name: functionality_wiring_run_live_workflow_demo
desc: Run a curated workflow demo against the live BridgeRegistry, wiring each step through ErrorManager so the error panel shows the timeline. Demos: swvs-demo-create-floor-plan, epm-demo-summary-dashboard, tag-demo-smart-place-tag, ws-demo-list-with-degrade, cobie-demo-list-component.

parameters.name: workflow_id
parameters.description: One of: swvs-demo-create-floor-plan, epm-demo-summary-dashboard, tag-demo-smart-place-tag, ws-demo-list-with-degrade, cobie-demo-list-component. Default: swvs-demo-create-floor-plan.

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: If true, walk the steps without invoking bridges (still surfaces WireRecoverable entries). Default false.
